## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential sponsorship opportunities between Marcel Santilli's AI workflow agency and ExitFive's marketing community.](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is interested in doing a webinar with ExitFive to promote his AI workflow agency](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [ExitFive has a webinar package for $24k that includes promotion via newsletters, LinkedIn, and a podcast episode](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [They discussed timing for a potential webinar in late 2023, with November being difficult due to holidays](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Marcel is also open to other paid/unpaid opportunities to engage with ExitFive's audience beyond just sponsorships](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

## Topics

### Introductions and Background

  - [Anna is a recent UT grad working at ExitFive for 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Marcel also went to UT for marketing/MIS and now works as CMO at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Dan is based in the Bay Area and co-founder of ExitFive](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Marcel's AI Workflow Agency

  - [Recently launched an agency focused on building AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Grew rapidly to $1M ARR in 3 months by doing workshops/webinars](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Has closed clients like Ramp, Reddit to train their employees](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [Looking to diversify marketing channels beyond his own network](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### Potential Webinar Sponsorship

  - [ExitFive's $24k webinar package includes promotion, live webinar (800-1000 registrants), follow-up podcast](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Timing discussed - Nov 19 a possibility but concerns about Thanksgiving week](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Early December may work better to avoid holiday conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Marcel interested if it can drive quality leads for his paid workshops](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)

### Other Engagement Opportunities

  - [Marcel open to other paid/unpaid ways to engage ExitFive's audience](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Mentioned accelerator program, podcast, or teaching marketing topics](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Referral revenue share model also a possibility](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dan to check availability for early December webinar slot](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Send Marcel full details on newsletter, other advertising options](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Explore potential for deeper partnership/engagement in 2024 if webinar goes well](https://fathom.video/share/qcgY7BocGKrL8yDCDNjkqcHqXDdUfpwp?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
